## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo test --release`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo build --release`
- [ ] Documentation updated when applicable

## Security impact

Describe any impact on authentication, workspace boundaries, file edits, commands, Git operations, transports, or stored data.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and includes relevant tests.
- [ ] No credentials, personal information, private URLs, or machine-specific paths are included.
- [ ] Public contract changes are documented.
